insight: Strategy advice should be evaluated on testable predictions (e.g., 'buying absorb wins more games') rather than vague high-level guidance. Weak predictions that are difficult to falsify (e.g., 'defending against chill is hard') provide minimal value even if correct.
author: punf
context: punf argued that expert strategy claims should meet high standards of falsifiability; this reflects one player's epistemological position rather than community consensus.
